title: 10 health benefits of Orthosiphon aristata (java tea)
intro: Orthosiphon aristata has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving kidney function. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. By consuming java tea, individuals with kidney stones or urinary tract infections can experience relief from symptoms and improved overall well-being. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties can help alleviate joint pain and swelling, allowing people to enjoy daily activities without discomfort.
